message:
fix(codegen): Add newlines after inline assertion statements

**Problem:**
Inline assertion statements (generated from self.assertEqual() etc.)
were missing newlines, causing subsequent statements to be concatenated
on the same line, leading to "expected ';' after statement" errors:

```zig
if (!cond) return error.AssertionFailed;            line = f.readline();
```

**Root Cause:**
Assertion codegen in assertions.zig emitted:
`return error.AssertionFailed;` (no newline)

This caused all subsequent statements to be smashed together without
proper line separation.

**Solution:**
Changed all 23 occurrences of:
`return error.AssertionFailed;"`
to:
`return error.AssertionFailed;\n"`

**Impact:**
- Inline assertions (self.assertEqual, etc.) now have proper newlines
- Partially fixes "expected ';' after statement" errors (29 occurrences)
- unittest.assert*() function calls still need separate fix

**Test:**
test_bufio lines 58-61: Now have newlines after inline assertions ✅
test_bufio line 62: unittest.assertFalse() still missing semicolon (next fix)
